roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Transfer Out to Other County
PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT
DEF MOR FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING AND ORDER RELEASE ON OR FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/NP/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SANFRANCISCO COUNTY TO ALEMADE COUNTY/DEF: TO REPORT TO APD WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM TODAY,/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/BE/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON APD MTR/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:11-08-19/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTORD:6 MONTH COUNTY JAIL IS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF 52 WEEK DOMESTIC VIOLENCE CLASSES/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY COMPLETE PROGRAM IN ALAMEDA COUNTY/CTORD:REPORT TO PROBATION TODAY//PROB EXT:11-29-21/4019HALF/BE/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/SUPP:11-08-19/PROB ADM REV/S50/SA1:JENNIFER FLORES/SA2:13949 DOLITTLE DR SANLEANDRO CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CONTD:RETURN ON SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT APD MTR/DOP/

/AJW/DNACOMP/X:THE SENTENCE ON COUNTS 2 AND 6 ARE THE SAME AND CONCURRENTAS FOLLOWS:/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 180D/CTS:39/4019HALF/IND/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S DRIVER'S LICENSE TO BE REVOKED FOR A PERIOD OF1 YEAR/X: DEFENDANT IS ORDERED NOT TO DRIVE A VEHICLE UNLESS IT IS EQUIPPED WITH A CERTIFIED IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR,/WS/PF390 18/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/RESTV/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/PPRFCOMP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/
/CAL:RETURN ON SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT APD MTR/CONTD:PHC ON APD MTR/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2, 6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:07-31-18/PPRFCUST/DISM3/ARBUCKLE/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:07-12-18/987,2/NB/CONTD: TO SET IN DEPT, 20/DOP/
